inputs.prompt: watermark, texts, blurry, nsfw, naked, logo

inputs.value: A young joyful princess wearing a translucent white dress and a crown running across a snowy field

Create a children's picture book illustration. Place the main subject primarily on the right side, while the left side continues the same environment naturally.

Subject: A young girl with dark brown wavy hair and warm olive-toned skin  
Action: The child leaps through a golden sunlit meadow, her arms outstretched above her head while holding a glowing blue kites, eyes wide with wonder as she looks up toward the sky where stars are twinkling like diamonds against the vastness of space. She wears a red dress adorned with tiny silver embroidery around its neckline and sleeves, catching sunlight in every ripple. Her small feet leave behind faint footprints in the dewy grass beneath her boots which shimmer slightly under the light breeze. Behind her, the field stretches endlessly, blending softly into twilight hues painted in deep purples and magentas near the horizon line.  
Mood: Joyful awe, dreamlike serenity, ethereal beauty  
Color palette: Warm earth tones accented with vibrant golds, rich blues, gentle pinks, and radiant silvers reflecting off the moonlight scattered throughout the night air.  
Style: High-quality 3D animated fairy tale style, highly detailed digital painting, soft focus fantasy art.  
Visual qualities: Expressive subject design, cohesive full-spread composition, detailed but clean background, cinematic lighting, harmonious palette, no text, no letters, no words, no watermark, no logo.
